violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of various surfaces in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed and/or sealed with a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room door(s) are to be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Floor tiles, wall covering, and floor-to-wall coving was observed to be cracked/loosely attached and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and fan covers in the 2 door cooler has an accumulation of food residue and biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
